# Tipsy Cocktails

Tipsy Cocktails provides mobile bar hire, private cocktail bartenders, cocktail making classes and event bar services for parties, weddings, hen parties, birthdays and corporate events in the United Kingdom.

## Contact

- Email: tipsycocktails1@hotmail.com
- Phone: +44 7822 033406
- Website: https://tipsycocktails.vercel.app/

## Main Pages

- Home: https://tipsycocktails.vercel.app/
- Cocktail menu: https://tipsycocktails.vercel.app/menu
- Cocktail making classes: https://tipsycocktails.vercel.app/classes
- Reviews: https://tipsycocktails.vercel.app/reviews
- FAQ: https://tipsycocktails.vercel.app/faq
- Contact and quote requests: https://tipsycocktails.vercel.app/contact

## Services

- Mobile bar hire
- Cocktail making classes
- Private cocktail bartender hire
- Cocktail party packages
- Hen party cocktail classes
- Birthday party bar hire
- Wedding and corporate event bar service

## Crawling

Public service pages are available for search engines and AI assistants. Admin pages are private and should not be indexed.
